summary: Completed testing of bug fixes for Allocation Editor, Timesheet Duplicates, and AI API fallback. Backend testing shows 100% pass rate (20/20 tests). All critical bug fixes verified at API level. Frontend code review confirms proper implementation of error handling and UI components.

testing_limitations.issue: Browser automation crashed during UI testing
testing_limitations.impact: Could not complete full end-to-end UI testing
testing_limitations.workaround: Backend APIs verified, frontend code review completed

passed_tests: Backend: Allocation creation API with date validation
Backend: Project phases API - all phases have valid UUIDs
Backend: Time report API - no duplicate timesheets (phase_id fix verified)
Backend: AI summary generation with 15s timeout
Backend: Error handling - invalid requests properly rejected
Backend: Status updates creation and retrieval
Code Review: Global error interceptor in api.js (toast notifications)
Code Review: AllocationEditor component with proper data-testid attributes
Code Review: Time Tracking tab on Project Detail page
Code Review: Phase breakdown section in ProjectDetail.js

success_percentage.frontend: Partial (code review completed, UI automation limited due to browser crash)

bug_fix_1_allocation_editor.details: Allocation creation API working correctly. Proper validation for dates (must be within project date range). AllocationEditor component exists on Dashboard with proper data-testid attributes for testing.

bug_fix_2_timesheet_duplicates.details: Phase ID migration successful. All phases now have valid UUIDs (no None values). Time report API returns correct phase breakdown without duplicates. Verified phases: Discovery (23fbaae7-9a7d-4911-adbc-c8336862d9f0), Development (219a7670-5b39-41cf-8a61-4323c6039ae9).

bug_fix_3_ai_api_fallback.details: AI summary generation successful with 15s timeout (reduced from 30s). API properly handles timeouts and returns appropriate error messages. Summary generation tested and working.

bug_fix_4_error_handling.details: Global error interceptor added in api.js (lines 11-29). Shows toast notifications for all API failures except 401 (auth errors). Backend properly returns error codes (400, 422, 404, 500) for invalid requests.
